subject: physics
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ1.18
question_html:
A standing wave is formed on a rope. The distance between the first and fifth antinode on the standing wave is 60 cm. What is the wavelength of the wave?

A.  12 cm

B.  15 cm

C.  24 cm

D.  30 cm
examiners_html: Option D was the most common (correct) answer, however answers A and B proved to be significant distractors. This would be a useful practice question when reviewing standing waves, nodes/antinodes and wavelengths.
